title: ipheion recurvifolium
intro: Ipheion recurvifolium, also known as the Strawberry Ivy or Autumn Starflower, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Amaryllidaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Ipheion recurvifolium include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared for herbal use through infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
